title: Simple Immversive World
description: Simply an immersive huge new world to discover.
body:
What if the Minecraft world had a realistic structure just like Earth, moreover, it would turn into a vast world with oceans and brand new biomes (200+ !!), some mystical events and unknown structures open to discovery, ancient items with many different creatures.

 

Normally I want to preserve vanilla as much as possible but there are some mods that really deserve to be added (like "[BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)" , "[BetterCombat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)").

 

"[Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration)" mod is optional but it makes game more challenging which is fun :') If you just want to explore and kill some creatures disabling this mod will be a good idea.

 


- Minimum 6GB ram is recommended




- It requires Fabric API




old versions: [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/simw)

for contact, discord: necm23
